transactions.description: New York Yankees placed LHP Ryan Weathers on the paternity list.
New York Yankees recalled RHP Jake Bird from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees sent RHP Gerrit Cole on a rehab assignment to Hudson Valley Renegades.
New York Yankees sent RHP Gerrit Cole on a rehab assignment to Hudson Valley Renegades.
New York Yankees sent LHP Carlos Rodón on a rehab assignment to Hudson Valley Renegades.
New York Yankees placed RHP Angel Chivilli on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 23, 2026. Right shoulder discomfort.
New York Yankees activated LHP Ryan Weathers from the paternity list.
New York Yankees recalled LF Jasson Domínguez from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees optioned RHP Luis Gil to Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
New York Yankees placed DH Giancarlo Stanton on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 25, 2026. Right calf strain.
New York Yankees recalled 3B Max Schuemann from Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
